content: We can refactor 2024-2025 cutting-edge active learning agent memory systems to store novelty prediction errors from curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (ICM/RND) as prioritized memory engrams, instead of only storing task-specific interaction trajectories. This means curious autonomous agents will automatically retain and revisit the most surprising, edge-case experiences to improve future active sample selection, rather than discarding low-reward unexpected observations.
